simple_neutronics_2g.problem_description: Deterministic 2-group diffusion regression benchmark (PrismaticCore: H=100 cm, D=50 cm; mesh 3 axial x 5 radial; fixed 2-group XS).

benchmark_k_eff.notes: This is a stability/regression reference (not an external standards benchmark).

u235_fission_high_energy.notes: U-235 fission cross-section at ~29 MeV (high-energy region). This is a regression baseline based on current parser output. Note: Parser currently returns limited energy grid; thermal values require enhanced parser.

u235_capture_high_energy.notes: U-235 capture cross-section at ~29 MeV. Regression baseline. Enhanced parser needed for thermal region validation.

u238_capture_high_energy.notes: U-238 capture cross-section at ~29 MeV. Regression baseline. Enhanced parser needed for thermal region validation.
